FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class ImageEl

Namespace
FluentGpu.Dsl
Assembly
FluentGpu.Dsl.dll

An async image (album art): shows Placeholder until the decode lands, then the bitmap. Decode is off-thread + cached + residency-pinned while on screen (see ImageCache).

public sealed record ImageEl : Element, IEquatable<Element>, IEquatable<ImageEl>
Inheritance
object
Element
ImageEl
Implements
IEquatable<Element>
IEquatable<ImageEl>

object.GetType()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Properties

AlignSelf 

public FlexAlign AlignSelf { get; init; }

Property Value

FlexAlign

AspectRatio

Width÷height ratio (CSS aspect-ratio). When set, a fluid image (one or both of Width/Height left NaN) derives the missing dimension — e.g. a tile that fills its column width and stays square (1f). The thing WinUI lacks (no SizeChanged/Viewbox hacks). NaN = off (use explicit Width/Height).

public float AspectRatio { get; init; }

Property Value

float

BlurHash

Optional BlurHash string — a tiny blurred LQIP preview shown instantly (decoded to a small texture) until the full-res art lands. Falls back to the flat Placeholder tint when null.

public string? BlurHash { get; init; }

Property Value

string

Corners 

public CornerRadius4 Corners { get; init; }

Property Value

CornerRadius4

DecodePx

Decode-size hint (target px) used when the layout extent is fluid (Width is NaN, so the real box size isn't known at request time). Ignored when Width is explicit (that drives the decode). NaN ⇒ decode at source resolution.

public float DecodePx { get; init; }

Property Value

float

ElementTypeId

Stable per-record-type id for integer type-dispatch in the reconciler (the source-gen'd ElementTypeId).

public override ushort ElementTypeId { get; }

Property Value

ushort

Fit

How the decoded pixels map into the layout box — see ImageFit. Default Cover (aspect-preserving crop), what most grids want; harmless for square-source/square-box.

public ImageFit Fit { get; init; }

Property Value

ImageFit

Height 

public float Height { get; init; }

Property Value

float

Margin 

public Edges4 Margin { get; init; }

Property Value

Edges4

Placeholder

Unified channel: static tint, thunk, or signal (pairs with a bound Source).

public Prop<ColorF> Placeholder { get; init; }

Property Value

Prop<ColorF>

Source

Unified channel: a static path/URL, a thunk (bound virtual rows re-request art when the thunk's signals change — the recycled slot swaps without an element rebuild), or a concrete signal.

public Prop<string> Source { get; init; }

Property Value

Prop<string>

Transition

Override the placeholder→image reveal transition (duration + easing). Null ⇒ Default; pass None to disable the fade (instant).

public ImageTransition? Transition { get; init; }

Property Value

ImageTransition?

Width 

public float Width { get; init; }

Property Value

float
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
